reviews.comment:
Nosotros concurrimos a la cafetería diariamente y  la atención es excelente por parte de cada uno de los empleados que atienden en la full. Siempre nos atienden con una sonrisa. Impecable la presentación del servicio. Destaco la amabilidad  por sobre todas las cosas .

(Translated by Google)
We go to the cafe daily and the service is excellent from every single employee. They always greet us with a smile. The presentation is impeccable. I especially want to highlight their friendliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuajdhMjhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención por donde la mires , Claudia una persona de valores, deje olvidado mi monedero con muchísima documentación y se esmeró en contactarme para Dármelo Gracias gracias Gracias, Elijo creer qué hay gente buena en esta Argentina!.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service in every way. Claudia is a person of integrity. I left my wallet with a lot of documents behind, and she went out of her way to contact me and return it. Thank you, thank you, thank you! I choose to believe that there are good people in Argentina!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURucDgzanlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero andaba a los insultos con su compañero y la señora que atendía el Shop tenía una pachorra para atender que se me enfrió el tostado de esperar

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was arguing with his coworker, and the lady working at the shop was so slow that my toast got cold from waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURINDRTYVFREAE

reviews.comment:
siempre cargo nafta en esa estación, el personal que trabaja en la playa es excelente!!! pero el servicio de las señoras de adentro es deplorable y son unas maleducadas.
Son muy lentas, tratan mal a la gente, no están capacitadas  para la atención al  cliente y tampoco para cobrar con posnet.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at that station. The staff working at the beach is excellent!!! But the service from the ladies inside is deplorable and they're rude.
They're very slow, they treat people poorly, they're not trained in customer service, and they're not trained in POS payment methods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURubE52Nl9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
